title: Corrosion inhibitors and related processes for their production and use
abstract: Corrosion inhibiting compositions and related processes for their production and use are described in this disclosure. The composition includes one or more quaternary ammonium halides. The one or more quaternary ammonium halides include a quaternary ammonium cation and a counterion. The counterion has a charge sufficient to balance the positive charge on the quaternary ammonium cation.
